concept.shortdesc: Model: CD100S-7 | Engine: DL06P Tier-4 | Rated Capacity: 10,000 kg | Load Centre: 600

conbody.p: Model: CD100S-7 | Engine: DL06P Tier-4 | Rated Capacity: 10,000 kg | Load Centre: 600 mm | Lift Height: 3,300 mm (standard)
Overall Length (without forks): 3,520 mm | Overall Width: 1,350 mm | Overall Height (mast lowered): 2,390 mm | Turning Radius: 2,720 mm
Travel Speed (loaded): 22 km/h | Travel Speed (unloaded): 25 km/h | Lift Speed (loaded): 0.40 m/s | Lowering Speed (loaded): 0.50 m/s
Service Weight: 12,300 kg | Tyre Size (front): 9.00-20 | Tyre Size (rear): 7.00-15 | Fuel Tank Capacity: 150 litres
Engine Power: 118 kW | Displacement: 5,890 cc | Emissions: Tier-4 Final compliant | Cooling: Liquid cooled
Page 386 of 500 | CD100S-7 / CD120S-7 / CD140S-7 / CD160S-7 Operation & Maintenance Manual | DL06P Tier-4
Always follow all safety precautions when operating or maintaining this equipment.
Ensure all operators are properly trained and certified before operating the lift truck.
Regular maintenance is essential to safe and efficient operation of the lift truck.
Contact your local CROWN dealer for parts, service, and technical support.
Keep this manual with the lift truck at all times for reference by operators and technicians.
Record all service and maintenance activities in the maintenance logbook.
Only use genuine CROWN replacement parts to maintain warranty and performance.
